title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND NINETY-EIGHT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
H. No. 10095 / General Appropriation Act of 1998

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8522, February 14, 1998 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND NINETY-EIGHT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
